subject: New Opening: Microservices Engineer – Healthcare
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Carevault
ROLE: Senior Microservices Engineer
START: 2024-04-17
DURATION: 6 months
LOCATION: Malmö / on-site
RATE: 1025 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, AWS, Kubernetes and MongoDB.

Key requirements:
• Java
• AWS
• Kubernetes
• MongoDB

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Maria Svensson
Senior Talent Manager
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 70 567 89 01
